folio.label: 79v
folio.l: Now sire q¶ she , I coude amende al this
If that me list , er it were dayes three
So wel ©e mygút bere ©ow , vn to me
¢ But for ©e speken , of swicú gentilnesse
As is descendid , out of olde richesse
That therfore ©e shulden , ben gentilmen
Swicú arrogance , is nat wortú an hen
Loke who that is most , vertuous al wey
Preue and apert´ and most entendetú ay
To do the gentil dedis , that he can
Take hi~ for the grettest , gentil man
Crist wol we clayme of hi~ , oure gentilnesse
Nougút of oure eldres , for here old richesse
For thougú they ©eue vs , al here heritage
For whicú we cleyme , to be of hey parage
ñet may they nat be quethe , for no thyngö
To noon of vs , here vertuous leuyngö
That mad he~ gentil men , called to be
And bad vs folwen hem , in swicú degree
Wel can the wys poete , of Florence
That higút Dant , speken of this sentence
Lo in swicú manä ryme , is Dantes tale
Ful selde vp risetú , by his braunches smale
Prowesse of man , for god of his goodnes
Wol , that of hi~ we clayme , oure gentilnes
For of´ oure auncestres , mow we no thyngö clayme
But temporal thyngö , that man may hurt & mayme
Euäy wygút wot this , as wel as I
If gentilnesse were plaunted , naturelly
Vn to a certeyn lynage , dounö the lyne
Pryue and apert , than wold they neuäe fyne
To don of gentilnesse , the fair office
They mygút do , no velanye or vice
Tak fir & bere it , in the derkest hous
Be twix this , and the Mount of Caukasous
And lete men shette the dores , & go thenne
ñet wol the fyr , as faire lye and brenne
As twenty thousand men , mygút it byholde
His office naturel , ay wol it holde
Vp ¹il of my lyf , til that it deye
Here may ©e se wel , how that gentrie
Is nat annexed , to possessione
Sitú folk ne doon , here o¹acione
Alwey as dotú the fir , lo in his kynde
For god it wot , men moun wel often fynde
A lordes sone do shame , and velanye
And he that wol han , prys of his gentrye
For he was bornö , of a gentil hous
And had hise auncestres , noble and vertuous

note.notetxt: 1127the last 2 lines are crammed intoone line space.ODR
